banner.description: Manage device pairing requests, review paired nodes, and rotate or revoke device tokens from the real OpenClaw workspace.
banner.title: Devices

page.confirmRemoveDevice: Remove this paired device from the workspace?
page.confirmRevokeToken: Revoke the {{role}} token for this device?

pendingRequests.title: Pending requests
pendingRequests.description: Approve or reject devices that are asking to join the current OpenClaw workspace.
pendingRequests.empty: There are no pending pairing requests.

pairedDevices.title: Paired devices
pairedDevices.description: Review the devices that already hold an approved pairing with this workspace.
pairedDevices.empty: No paired devices are currently registered.

pairingGuide.title: Pairing guide
pairingGuide.description: Use the official OpenClaw device pairing flow so tokens and approvals stay aligned with the active built-in runtime.

steps.open: Open the OpenClaw device or node client and start a pairing request against the built-in gateway.
steps.connect: Wait for the request to appear here with its requested roles, scopes, and source address.
steps.approve: Approve the request, then rotate or revoke device tokens here whenever the device credentials change.

tokenList.title: Token list
tokenList.noSelection: Select a paired device to inspect its tokens.
tokenList.selectDevice: Choose a paired device to inspect issued tokens and rotate credentials.
tokenList.empty: No device token has been issued yet for the selected device.

tokenReveal.title: New device token generated
tokenReveal.description: Copy the new token for {{device}} (role: {{role}}) and store it securely.

page.subtitle: Operate the real OpenClaw pairing workspace instead of simulated device telemetry.
page.title: Devices
